ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used (e.g., Random Forest, SVM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its purpose */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "model_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the model belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_owner FOREIGN KEY ("model_owner") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "top_1_accuracy" REAL /* Top-1 accuracy of the model */,
  "top_2_accuracy" REAL /* Top-2 accuracy of the model */,
  "top_3_accuracy" REAL /* Top-3 accuracy of the model */,
  "time_ratio" REAL /* Time ratio taken for model prediction */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUC-ROC) */,
  "log_loss" REAL /* Log loss of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for model evaluation */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset and its characteristics */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., tabular, image) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_dataset_owner FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_owner") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Supervised, Unsupervised) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being assigned to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the model belongs */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_category_assignments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this hyperparameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., training, deployed) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_status_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received based on the evaluation */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "evaluated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluated_by FOREIGN KEY ("evaluated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
